title: Fill packages/shared — migrate shared types + scaffold i18n infrastructure
description: packages/shared 当前 export {}. 将 AgentsMeta/LedgerEntry/HumanLockEntry/FabricConfig 四个类型从 cli/server 迁移至 shared/src/types/, 新建 i18n 骨架 7 文件 (locales/en.ts + zh-CN.ts, types.ts, create-translator.ts, detect-node-locale.ts, normalize-locale.ts, index.ts). cli/server/dashboard 添加 @fabric/shared workspace 依赖, 验证 pnpm -r build 全部通过.

files.change: Export AgentsMeta, LedgerEntry, HumanLockEntry, FabricConfig — migrated from cli/server
Extract AgentsMeta type from packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts or sync-meta.ts
Extract LedgerEntry and HumanLockEntry from packages/cli/src
TranslationKey, Locale ('en' | 'zh-CN'), Translator type, Messages interface
en locale skeleton with keys matching CLI commands and Dashboard views — placeholder values
zh-CN locale skeleton matching en.ts structure — placeholder values
createTranslator(locale: Locale): Translator — returns t(key) function with fallback to 'en'
detectNodeLocale(): Locale — reads FAB_LANG env, then LANG, normalizes to 'en'|'zh-CN', defaults to 'en'
normalizeLocale(raw: string): Locale — maps 'zh', 'zh_CN', 'zh-TW' etc. to 'zh-CN' or 'en'
Re-export all i18n symbols: createTranslator, detectNodeLocale, normalizeLocale, types
Replace export {} with: export * from './types/index'; export * from './i18n/index'

implementation: Search existing type definitions: grep -r 'AgentsMeta\|LedgerEntry\|HumanLockEntry\|FabricConfig' packages/cli/src packages/server/src to locate source files
Create packages/shared/src/types/ directory with agents.ts, ledger.ts, config.ts — copy types verbatim, do not change signatures
Create packages/shared/src/i18n/types.ts — define Locale, TranslationKey, Messages, Translator interfaces
Create packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts and zh-CN.ts — minimal skeleton, keys can be added in TASK-008
Create packages/shared/src/i18n/create-translator.ts — factory using Messages lookup with 'en' fallback
Update packages/shared/src/index.ts: export * from types and i18n
Add @fabric/shared workspace:* to cli/server/dashboard package.json dependencies
Update import paths in cli/server where types were extracted from — replace local type definitions with @fabric/shared imports
Run pnpm install && pnpm -r build — verify all 4 packages build successfully

reference.pattern: TypeScript barrel exports + pnpm workspace dependency

criteria: packages/shared/src/types/index.ts exports AgentsMeta, LedgerEntry, HumanLockEntry, FabricConfig
packages/shared/src/i18n/ contains exactly 7 files: types.ts, locales/en.ts, locales/zh-CN.ts, create-translator.ts, detect-node-locale.ts, normalize-locale.ts, index.ts
pnpm -r build succeeds for all 4 packages (exit code 0)
convergence.definition_of_done: shared 包从 export {} 变为完整类型 + i18n 基础设施, 三个消费包可 import @fabric/shared, 全包 build 通过

rationale.chosen_approach: 骨架优先 (skeleton-first) — 先建 i18n 基础设施架构, 实际翻译字符串在 TASK-008 填充, 避免大任务阻塞
alternatives_considered: 直接在 cli/server 内部维护 i18n
使用 i18next 库代替自建
decision_factors: TASK-007 protected-tokens.ts 需要 shared 已存在
TASK-008 i18n 接入依赖 shared i18n infrastructure
自建 i18n 避免额外运行时依赖
rationale.tradeoffs: i18n 骨架 key 集合在 TASK-005 可能不完整, TASK-008 需要补充

risks.description: 类型迁移后 cli/server 的原始 import 路径需要更新, 可能有遗漏
risks.mitigation: 迁移后立即运行 pnpm -r typecheck 发现所有 import 错误
risks.fallback: 保留原始类型文件作为 re-export shim, 逐步迁移

risks.description: detect-node-locale.ts 的 LANG 环境变量在 Windows 上行为不同
risks.mitigation: FAB_LANG 优先, LANG 作为 fallback, 最终 fallback 到 'en'

interfaces.name: Translator
interfaces.definition: type Translator = (key: string, vars?: Record<string, string>) => string

key_functions.signature: createTranslator(locale: Locale, messages: Record<Locale, Messages>): Translator
key_functions.purpose: Factory that returns a t() function bound to locale
Read FAB_LANG > LANG env vars, normalize, return supported locale
Map arbitrary locale strings to supported Locale union

commit.message_template: feat(shared): migrate shared types + scaffold i18n infrastructure
